user.description: Exploring AI, business, and internet trends. Sharing what I learn along the way
user.name: Manav

tweets.text:
Databricks just open-sourced Omnigent, a layer that sits above your existing AI agents, Claude Code, Codex, Pi, custom ones, and turns them into a single composable, governed system. 

It was built in six weeks, and it is a clean statement of where serious agent engineering is https://t.co/pHJak7ffbH
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text:
Generative AI just hit 53 percent of the entire world's population in three years, spreading faster than the personal computer or the internet did. The Stanford report documenting this is full of numbers that complicate the simple story everyone tells about who is winning.

The https://t.co/hM30j3rtmo
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text:
NVIDIA analyzed 42,447 public AI agent skills, the capability packages that tools like Claude Code and other agents install and run, and the results are the npm-malware era all over again, this time for agents. So NVIDIA open-sourced the scanner built to catch them.

The tool is https://t.co/IJvTqzB3jG
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text:
Humanoid robots just crossed the line from research demo to factory floor. For years they were impressive YouTube clips operating in controlled labs. As of 2026, they are production tools, and the entire first year of output is already committed to one buyer.

The robot is Atlas, https://t.co/UlbKvCcPGt
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text: One of the most powerful AI models ever released to the public lasted three days before a government directive pulled it. The story underneath is not about a product launch. It is about who is allowed to hold the most capable version of this technology, and the answer turns out https://t.co/0l82bQVkZd
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text:
Two things change in the Anthropic ecosystem today at 9AM PT.

If you build with Claude, both of them could break your production code before lunch.

Here is every number you need and exactly what to do.Deadline one. Two model IDs stop working today.

Anthropic announced on April https://t.co/Z3KaZWnZe7
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text:
The co-founder of Plex left the company, then quietly built a free music player that turns a $35 Raspberry Pi into an audiophile streaming system you fully own. No subscription. No cloud. No company that can take it away.

It is called Caldera Music, and it shipped in June 2026.
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text:
The number of security vulnerabilities found in open-source code jumped 107 percent in a single year. 
The cause is not that developers suddenly got worse.
It is that AI is now writing code faster than anyone can secure it.

The figure comes from Black Duck's 2026 Open Source https://t.co/x84UGnjkxk
tweets.name: Manav

tweets.text:
Anthropic just launched two new models. This is what actually happened.

Claude Fable 5 launched on June 9, 2026. It is the first Mythos-class model Anthropic has made available to the general public, and the most capable model the company has ever released outside of restricted https://t.co/zsUhWr0lrw

tweets.text:
Between 2023 and 2026, the estimated share of content on the public web generated fully or primarily by AI increased from under 3 percent to between 30 and 57 percent.

The range is wide because distinguishing AI-generated content from human-written content has become genuinely https://t.co/99HgVRZJJG
